abstract: Master orchestration skill that takes a gstack implementation plan and ships it via parallel Claude Code subagents in isolated git worktrees. Sits between /autoplan (or /plan-eng-review) and /review + /ship. Shreds plans into parallelizable subtasks, dispatches them wave-by-wave with worktree isolation, verifies each wave, hands off to /review and /ship. v1.6 adds telemetry hooks (skill-level + per-wave timeline events) so performance can be tracked alongside sibling gstack skills.
instructionScope: The SKILL.md instructs the orchestrator (Claude) to read a plan file, shred it into wave-grouped tasks, dispatch each task as an isolated-worktree Agent subagent, cherry-pick successful commits onto the working branch, and hand off to /review + /ship. The orchestrator never writes feature code itself. State persists in ~/.gstack/projects/<slug>/orchestrate/<branch>/. Telemetry writes to ~/.gstack/analytics/skill-usage.jsonl and ~/.gstack/projects/<slug>/timeline.jsonl.

networkSideEffects.note: Local-first. Telemetry writes to local JSONL files. Optional remote telemetry only fires when gstack-config telemetry tier is community or anonymous, via the existing gstack-telemetry-log binary (opt-in).
